title: fix(hunch): harden LLM structured-output parsing (3 adversarial review rounds)
context:
With the API/tool-use provider gone, synthesis depends on parsing free-text
`claude -p` output into Decision/Bug drafts. Three rounds of multi-agent
adversarial review found (and verified) defects in the parser, the
fallback contract, and — twice — in my own fixes. Final design:

Parsing (provider.ts):
- String-aware extraction: balancedEnd/sliceBalancedJson and a string-aware
  stripTrailingCommas no longer miscount braces or corrupt a comma INSIDE a
  string value (the old depth counter and a
decision: Changed src/synthesis, test/provider.test.ts: added balancedEnd, looksLikeJsonObject, topLevelJsonSlices, stripTrailingCommas, tryParseObject, parseObjectLoose, extractJsonObjects, asSeverity; changed extractJson, draftDecisionSafe, draftBugSafe; new dep(s): node:test, node:assert/strict; 1 new file(s).
